company: NPTEL Winter Internship Programme - IIT Ropar
description: Completed a 10-week internship focused on MERN stack development, problem-solving, case studies, and real-world project development under the guidance of Prof. Sudarshan Iyengar.
responsibilities: Learned and applied MERN stack concepts in full-stack application development.
Worked on technical case studies to improve analytical and problem-solving skills.
Participated in viva and endorsement evaluations during the internship process.
Developed a real-world full-stack project with frontend, backend, and database integration.

description: Completed internship training focused on deploying and managing containerized applications using Docker on Red Hat Enterprise Linux environments. Worked on Linux administration, container lifecycle management, and scalable deployment practices.
responsibilities: Deployed and managed a containerized To-Do application using Docker on Red Hat Linux environments.
Handled container lifecycle management, image optimization, and Linux-based deployment workflows.
Configured and maintained Linux environments for application hosting and container execution.
Integrated frontend and backend services to ensure smooth application functionality and responsive user experience.
Applied best practices for Docker containerization, scalability, and system administration.
